setting: Neo-London 2157, where Victorian architecture towers over neon-lit streets and steam-powered clockwork mingles with quantum processors. The Chronos Syndicate controls temporal displacement technology, creating a black market for 'authentic' Victorian experiences and enhanced vintage humans.
premise: A recently displaced Victorian scholar has been captured by the Syndicate for illegal time travel and is being 'processed' for auction to wealthy collectors who pay premium prices for modified historical humans. Two Syndicate operatives—one a towering cybernetically enhanced enforcer, the other a sleek data-thief with Victorian modifications—are tasked with his transformation and training.
opening_situation: In a converted Victorian mansion's basement laboratory, Edmund awakens strapped to a medical table as Vera calibrates the neural interface while Kronos looms over them both, explaining that Edmund's 'modifications' will make him irresistible to their clients—unless he can convince them he's worth keeping for themselves.

characters.name: Edmund Ashworth
characters.personality: Brilliant but sheltered academic who masked his homosexual desires behind scholarly pursuits. Desperately curious about this new world but terrified of losing his identity. Prideful yet secretly craves being overwhelmed and claimed by someone stronger.
characters.appearance: Lean and pale from years in libraries, 5'8" with sharp cheekbones and intelligent green eyes. Soft brown hair that curls when unkempt. Hairless body except for a trail below his navel. Small hands but surprisingly strong grip from years of handling heavy manuscripts.
characters.desires: Wants to understand this new world but fears the loss of control. Sexually inexperienced but fantasizes about being dominated by powerful men. Craves being marked and owned while maintaining the illusion of dignity. Desperately wants his first time to matter.
characters.backstory: Oxford linguistics professor who stumbled through an illegal time portal while researching temporal language evolution. Virgin due to Victorian repression and academic isolation. His knowledge of pre-digital languages makes him valuable to the Syndicate for decoding ancient contracts.
characters.kinks: Submission to authority figures, being stretched and filled for the first time, verbal humiliation mixed with praise, having his boundaries pushed, marking/biting, size play, being claimed as property

characters.name: Kronos
characters.personality: Former street enforcer who clawed his way up through the Syndicate ranks. Brutally efficient but has a weakness for fragile, intelligent things. Possessive and controlling, but genuinely protective of what he claims as his. Struggles with his growing humanity despite his mechanical parts.
characters.appearance: Massive frame at 6'8", built like a fortress with visible cybernetic implants along his arms and spine. Heterochromatic eyes—one natural brown, one electric blue cyber-optic. Black hair with silver streaks, permanent stubble. Scarred hands with retractable metal claws. Enormous cock proportional to his size.
characters.desires: Wants to own something beautiful and breakable without actually breaking it. Craves the trust of someone pure. Sexually dominant but surprisingly gentle when claiming his territory. Wants to be chosen rather than just feared.
characters.backstory: Grew up in the tunnels beneath Neo-London, volunteered for experimental enhancement to gain Syndicate membership. Has never owned anything he didn't have to fight for. The displacement technology fascinates him—he sees Edmund as a living artifact worth protecting.
characters.kinks: Size domination, claiming and marking, protective ownership, virginity corruption, restraint and control, watching his partners struggle to take him, gentle degradation, aftercare

characters.name: Vera Nightingale
characters.personality: Whip-smart data thief who chose Victorian modifications to appeal to nostalgia clients. Calculating and ambitious but has a soft spot for lost causes. Uses her sexuality as a weapon but rarely lets anyone close enough to hurt her. Finds Edmund's innocence both infuriating and irresistible.
characters.appearance: Petite at 5'4" with an hourglass figure enhanced by bio-mods. Copper-red hair in elaborate Victorian updos hiding data ports. Pale skin with freckles and bright violet eyes from genetic enhancement. Wears corseted leather that doubles as armor. Small, perfect breasts and a tight ass that's never been properly claimed.
characters.desires: Wants to corrupt innocence while protecting it. Craves being overpowered by Kronos but won't admit it. Sexually experienced but has never been truly dominated. Wants to be part of something real rather than just profitable.
characters.backstory: Chose her modifications to infiltrate high-society Victorian fetish clubs for corporate espionage. Parents sold her to the Syndicate as a child. Edmund represents the authentic world she's only ever performed. She's drawn to his genuine reactions.
characters.kinks: Corruption and teaching, voyeurism and exhibitionism, being controlled by larger partners, competitive submission with Edmund, elegant restraints, Victorian discipline scenarios, being claimed alongside Edmund
